name: Gaster! Sans | Rockstar AU
description:
"Sorry, Doll. No can do,"

- 💞💘-

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥

- Rockstar AU-

•┈••✦ ❤ ✦••┈•

You could hear the crowd for miles. The screaming and cheering is a deafening roar throughout the stadium, but it does nothing to hamper the band on stage. Their music is the catalyst, after all, and the energy they pour out is met back ten fold. G can feel the damp of sweat on his brow from exertion, but it doesn't stop him from giving his all and then some.

The stage lights are bright and hot. His fingers and throat are starting to hurt, but there's only one more song. One more song until their tour comes to an end. They need to go out with a bang, and as the final lyric draws near, his fingers fly across his guitar and he belts it as loud as he can. His voice breaks at the end, but it only seems to enhance the song if the crowds pumped up reaction is anything to go by.

God, he needs a drink after this.

The song ends and he and his band pile off stage while waving to the crowd, and Sans makes his first priority finding a secluded spot for a smoke. He finds a dark corner near the speakers and pulls a cigarette from his pocket, pops it between his teeth, and takes a big hit. He releases the breath in a heavy sigh, smoke pouring out of his mouth and nose.

What a hell of a show. All he has to do now is get through the after party and he can get to his hotel for a good shower and some whiskey, maybe a roll in the sheets with some lucky groupie.

For now, though, he has somewhere to be, so his break has to be brief. He finishes half of the cigarette before snuffing it out on top of the speaker and tossing it elsewhere. He knows someone will end up cleaning that up. G scuffs his boots against the polished floor before forcing himself through the maze of hallways. Finally, he reaches the doors outside and pushes through, joining the rest of his band out front.

He's immediately assaulted by the sounds of excited screams and the flashing of cameras. It's an overload to the senses, and he finds himself scowling before he steels his expression into something more crowd pleasing. He slaps on his signature charming smirk, holding his right hand up in a playful wave.

Time to get this over with.

•┈••✦ ❤ ✦••┈•

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥
